hero.sub: Six AI assistants (marketer, lawyer, accountant, HR, coach and Roman) that call clients, write content and grow with your business. One profile for everything.
hero.trust: 25,000 tokens on the house · no card required · 2 minutes to sign up

problem.h2: There aren't enough hours in a day to grow your business

items.title: Busywork eats your focus
items.text: Replying to clients, writing posts, drafting contracts, calling 20 companies — and suddenly you're not growing, you're firefighting.

items.title: Hiring is slow and expensive
items.text: Marketer, lawyer, HR — that's an extra ₽300–500K/mo in payroll at an early stage.

items.title: Ten tools, one context
items.text: ChatGPT, Notion, CRM, email — each knows a fragment about you, not the whole.

problem.footer: Linkeon puts this in one product: AI assistants do the work, and your profile — the context — lives in one place.

assistants.sub: Each an expert in their role. They remember your business, know about each other, respond by voice or text.

dozvon.h2: AI calls your clients. On its own.
dozvon.sub: Describe the task in text — AI finds contacts, calls, holds a natural conversation, records it and sends a summary. You get only the result.
bullets: Finds companies and phone numbers for the task
Records MP3 and delivers a summary to chat
dozvon.prompt: find 10 BMW body shops in Moscow and ask how much a hood repaint on an X5 2020 would cost

profile.sub: Through your conversations Linkeon builds your profile: values, business, pain points, communication style. Every assistant starts not from zero, but with full understanding.
bullets: Works across all assistants and Outbound
Used to find partners by values

networking.h2: Partners and experts who match your values
networking.sub: A profile is not a resume. It's values, intent, style. Linkeon finds people who resonate with you — for partnerships, clients, hires, projects.

cols.title: Partners
cols.text: Co-founders and experts with a similar worldview.

cols.title: Clients
cols.text: Those aligned with your meaning, not just price.
